sys_script_include.description:
Scorecard Engine for DORA metrics, production readiness, security, and compliance checks.
Port.io-equivalent Scorecard Features: - Production Readiness scoring - DORA metrics (Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, MTTR, Change Failure Rate) - Security compliance checks - Health checks with auto-remediation - Golden signals monitoring
sys_script_include.name: IDPScorecardEngine
